original_snippet_context: Discussion of expenses related to public works projects.
relevant_quote: o levantamento do destinado á Caixa da Amortisação
justification: This phrase simply mentions the "Caixa da Amortisação" (Amortization Fund/Sinking Fund) in the context of planned construction.  It doesn't express any opinion about the *Caixa de Conversão* itself or its associated monetary policies.
